description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the php:7.0 Docker image. Add a before_script that runs apt-get update -yqq, apt-get install -yqq git, curl -sS https://getcomposer.org/installer | php, and php composer.phar update --no-interaction --prefer-source --prefer-stable, and cache the vendor/ directory. Define a test job (stage test) that executes vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration phpunit.xml --coverage-text --colors=never.
